Internal: rebucket a Triangle to a coarser groups partition

Source: R/maturity.R
dot-rebucket_triangle_groups.Rd

Re-aggregates loss / prem / incr_loss / incr_prem over the dropped grouping columns and recomputes lr / incr_lr as ratios of the aggregated totals. Other cell-level columns (margin, profit, loss_share, ...) are not regenerated – the rebucketed object is intended for as_link() consumption only.

Usage

.rebucket_triangle_groups(x, groups)

Arguments

x

A Triangle object.

groups

NULL, character(0), or a character subset of attr(x, "groups"). NULL returns x unchanged.

Value

A Triangle with attr(., "groups") set to the requested value and loss / prem / lr aggregated to the requested partition.

On this page
